facts: I'm a band kid! I play the French Horn.
I speak Portuguese natively and English as a second language since I was little. A lot of my family lived in Canada so I got a lot of practice.
I learned German in middle school. I've forgotten most of it.
I own one blåhaj, his name is Blahajax.
I once burned my hand on a hot metal chimney, and then days later burned my other hand on the exact same pipe. I am very smart.
I know a bit of stonemasonry. Just barely enough to build a drystack wall though.
Can you tell green is my favorite color?
My online persona is an elf, but dwarves are arguably my favorite fantasy species.
As much as I would love to have natural ginger hair, my natural hair color is brown.
I once tried to learn Welsh. Still kind of bummed I never got very far.
I know a concerning amount of Elder Scrolls lore.
The best way to ensure I won't watch/read something is to constantly tell me I should.
I like cooking because unlike programming, all I have to do is follow the recipe, and things usually turn out fine.
I'm not much of a drinker, but I like apple cider.
I cracked my skull when I was 3 falling down a stairwell. I would say at least the helicopter ride was cool, but I was out for most of it.
I've lived with migraines for about as long as I can remember. Ibuprofen and I are very close friends.
I love the smell of perfume, but I can't use any on myself. Strong smells trigger my migraines.
